title: Google just dropped some huge AI updates
summary: Google announced multiple AI models and tools at Google I/O, including Gemini Omni, Gemini 3.5 Flash, Gemini Spark, new TPU hardware (TPU 8), and several AI-powered features across Google Search, Workspace, and other products. The video covers these launches and positioning them as major updates to Google's AI capabilities.
